Greetings

Miles' fiftieth birthday is in late March. I would
like to set up a tour to Los Angles and through
Canada by train (Something he has always wanted to
do). I would like to request that we take leave from
19 March through to 9 April. Please confirm if these
dates are in order as I need to book the trip.

Thanks in advance
